methodsAttempted.notes: Found research showcases, events, and member school content. No university-wide AI policy found.
Found training resources, events, and member school guidance. No centralized PSL student guidance.
Found URFIST training materials on academic integrity and AI. No PSL-wide academic integrity policy specific to AI.
Found pedagogical innovation center pages and training events. No official teaching guidance.
Found pedagogical innovation center content on assessment formats. No official assessment policy.
Found references to scientific integrity charter and open science charter, but no AI-specific charter.
Found MDPI article noting 'No guidelines were found on the website https://psl.eu/en as of 30 August 2024'. Confirms absence of centralized policy.
Found règlement de la scolarité PDF mentioning AI. Requires further review.
Found research content and events from Dauphine. No school-wide AI policy.
Found ENS research and news about AI. No official ENS AI policy for students.

summary: Comprehensive discovery via 10+ search queries across psl.eu and member school domains (dauphine.psl.eu, ens.psl.eu). Université PSL is a federal university comprising multiple grandes écoles. No dedicated central PSL generative-AI policy page was found, but the official PSL academic regulations PDF contains an AI disclosure/plagiarism rule. Member-school guidance from BU Paris-Dauphine provides research-integrity recommendations on transparency, responsibility, data privacy, and limitations. Six sources were rejected as research showcases, events, training materials, news, or low-specificity materials.
